title: Logitech M317c (Collection) Wireless Optical Mouse-color: Wireless Mouse Skate Burger
description: Logitech M317C Doodle Collection Wireless Mouse Navigation for your imagination A Doodle Collection Wireless Mouse takes you far away from the everyday. All the way to your happy place. Choose from doodle designs that reflect your creativity. From floating robot heads to skateboarding cheeseburgers, there’s a Doodle Mouse for each and every doodler. Lasts up to 18 months on a single battery. Responds up to 33 ft. (10m) with a nano wireless receiver. Rips through web pages and docs with precision scrolling. Daydream on for up to 18 months Your imagination is always on, just like your Doodle Mouse. Scroll all the way to your happy place on a single, pre-installed battery. Get your doodle on for up to 18 months.
features: EVERY DOODLE’S DIFFERENT Choose a unique design to express your creativity. From floating robot heads to skateboarding cheeseburgers, there’s a Doodle Collection Mouse for each and every doodler

Doodle away Doodle Mice are small, portable, and super responsive with a secure link between mouse and receiver from up to 33 feet (10m) away.* *Actual wireless range may vary with use, settings, and environmental conditions.
JOIN THE DOODLE Taking yourself seriously is no fun. So lighten up, express your creativity, and embrace the doodle lifestyle. You’re just a scroll away from your happy place.
System Requirements Windows 10 or later, Windows 8, Windows RT, Windows 7 Mac OS X 10.5 or later Chrome OS Linux Kernel 2.6+2 USB connection: available USB port required.

reviews.title: Fit my hand nicely
reviews.text: Love these mini Logitech mouse with all of our laptops. The designs are whimsical and the mouse works well with the laptops. (We have 4) Recommended!

reviews.title: Computer mouse
reviews.text: This is my second Logitech mouse. It’s cute, works well and is easy to install. I added this second one just to have a spare. No problems encountered.

title: VssoPlor Wireless Mouse, 2.4G Slim Portable Computer Mice with Nano Receiver for Notebook, PC, Laptop, Computer (Mint Green to Purple)

reviews.title: Very Nice
reviews.text:
Very nice. Looks good, I like the gold edging more than I thought I would. A little small, but I barely notice. The mouse I WAS using was HUGE, and my entire palm rested on it. This one only covers ⅔ of my palm.

Very comfortable.

Have not played anything that could be considered a stress test. I like that you can turn it off, but I dislike that you have to remember to turn it off.

I cannot tell if it goes to sleep.

reviews.title: wireless mouse
reviews.text: My old wireless finally died - dropped too many times onto the hardwood floor.  I purchased one that was like the old one and this one.  This one is flatter.  I ended up choosing to use this one.  It loaded quickly and is very comfortable to use.  Very, very quiet click - almost silent.  Having said all of this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

reviews.title: Good value for the price
reviews.text: This is a good value for the cost.  If you need something small and easy to carry around with you this is great. Especially right now I am between working from home but sometimes have to visit the office and the less and smaller items I carry, the better!  This is nice and slim and works great with my laptop.  I don't really like to use batteries but as long as you switch it off when not in use you will be able to get quite a bit of use out of one.

reviews.title: Loses Connection CONSTANTLY
reviews.text: I have to turn it off and on about 5x a day because it randomly loses connectivity. When I am using it or idle for less than 1 min.

reviews.title: Good So Far
reviews.text: Easy to install.  Nice color. Has on off switch with usb inside by battery.

title: Neises Ergonomic Mouse, Bluetooth Mouse for ipad,Bluetooth Mouse for MacBook Air/Mac/MacBook Pro/Mini/ipad Pro/iMac/Laptop,Rechargeable Wireless Mouse for MacBook Air/MacBook pro Chromebook Laptop PC
description:
Tip:Scientific ergonomic design maintains healthy wrist and arm positions to achieve smoother movement and reduce overall stress.
How to use it:
A. 2.4Ghz Mode:
Switch to "ON/OFF" button to right.And Plug the receiver into the USB port or use a USB C adapter to plug into the type c port of your computer, Then you can use the mouse in 2.4GHz Mode.
B. Bluetooth Mode:
Switch on Bluetooth on your device and power on the mouse. Press the DPI Button or Press Left,Roller and Right 3 Buttons together for 5 seconds.When the mouse name coming up on the device.Click it and it will be connected.
Note:
System Requirement: Windows 8/10, Android 4.2 and above,Mac & IOS 10.10(Compatiable with 4.2BLE、4.1BLE、4.0BLE or earlier)
Package Included:
1* Dual Mode Mouse
1* Charging Cable
1*USB Receiver (under earth the mouse)
1*Type C Adapter
Note:
1. It's out of power if the mouse cursor moves slowly or stop moving. Please recharge it. Note: Please do not charge the mouse with mobile phone charger.
2. Please charge the mouse for 2 hours before the first time to use it. The blue light beside the scroll wheel will be on while charging, and then goes off when the mouse is fully charged.
3. Not all computers support two modes. For example, Win 7 system does not support Bluetooth mode.
4. There is memory function on Bluetooth Type Mouse.When the mouse has connected another device,and now you would like connect the device not connected with the mouse last time, it should re-connect with the device.
5. If choosing Bluetooth connecting way, don’t insert USB receiver to the device you would to connect.Otherwise,it will choose 2.4G connecting way automatically.
features: 【2022 Latest Upgrade Optical Ergonomic Design】Reduce the overall pressure on the hand, specially designed for long-term use of the mouse, providing a more comfortable way to use.

【DUAL MODE BLUETOOTH MOUSE(BT 5.1 + 2.4GHz)】Dual mode wireless mouse one mouse can switch freely between two devices. Note: If choosing Bluetooth connecting way, don’t insert USB receiver to the device you would to connect.Otherwise,it will choose 2.4G connecting way automatically.

【BUILT-IN BATTERY AND AUTO ENERGY-SAVING】The mouse built-in rechargeable battery, with a charging cable. No need to change batteries. To saving power, the mouse will fall asleep after 10 minutes no-operation, it can be waken up by clicking any button.

【3 ADJUSTABLE DPI LEVELS AND SILENT CLICK】 Among 1000, 1200 and 1600 to meet different needs. Special soundless design for the right and left buttons, make you concentrate on working or playing games without disturbing others.
【MULTI-FUNCTION BUTTON】Forward and backward button to provide convenience for browsing pages and games.

reviews.title: Liked it but doesn’t last long
reviews.text: The reviews seemed to be a mix so I figured I’d give the mouse a shot with my MacBook. Worked great until one week after the return window closed and now it’s worthless junk. I would skip this.

reviews.title: Wheel Started Squeaking Less than 2 Weeks into Usage
reviews.text: I love the design of this mouse but the scrolling wheel started squeaking when used less than 14 days into using this mouse and it's, quite honestly, a bit maddening.  I can't figure out WHY it's squeaking and I've tried using compressed air to maybe clean something that might have gotten into the mouse to no avail.  It still squeaks.  All. The. Time.

reviews.title: Works perfectly with my iPad
reviews.text:
I bought this so I could mirror my iPad to my 27" iMac and play some gorgeous games on a big screen. The mouse lets me use the iPad as an, um, mousepad...works beautifully. The instructions were easy to follow and the box contains a wireless receiver if you don't want to use bluetooth. Also in the box is a USB adapter if you need to plug the receiver into a USB-C port.

And finally, the color-changing light bar is kinda sexy. A bargain at the price.

reviews.title: Great mouse
reviews.text: Love this mouse. Attached it to an iPad keyboard so now able to use it along w/ iPencil & touch screen. Very easy to use, fits in my hand comfortably & the light that emanates from it is a nice touch.

reviews.title: I’d move on, if i were you…
reviews.text: It was an ok product only until 2.5/3 months after purchase when it stopped working…. It’s only used for person use 2-3X a week.. so it’s announced my that it broke already!!!!

title: cimetech Rechargeable Cordless Mouse, 2.4G Computer Mouse Wireless Optical Mice for Laptop, Slim Quiet Wireless Mouse with USB Nano Receiver (Rose Quartz)
features: 【480mAh RECHARGEABLE BATTERY】Rechargeable laptop mouse built-In an 480mah Lithium ion battery, charge 1 hour and work for 2 months.Save you the cost of buying battery.

【5 ADJUSTABLE DPI】5 adjustable DPI 2400/2000/1600(default)/1200/800, high polling rate 125(default)/250 Hz computer mouse to meet your multi needs. Can easily change the pc mouse sensitivity to match your activity.
【2.4GHz WIRELESS】No driver, Plug & Play. Wireless mouse for laptop provide you with a more secure and precise experience with an increased working distance up to 15m/49FT. Faster response.
【QUIET CLICK MOUSE WIRELESS】Mute quite clicks make you concentrate on your work and free you worry about bothering others.
【SLIM AND PORTABLE DESIGN】Slim mouse ergonomic design and smooth frosted surface provide an incredible comfort fit. It’s easy to put in your laptop bag or pockets. Nice ultra thin appearance.

reviews.title: Good find!
reviews.text: I got this to keep in my work bag as a backup/when I work from home. I will say the first impression wasn't stellar. The top plastic has a cheap look/feel to it. But it also makes up in some nice touches. For example, the USB fob. I was apprehensive about the keep slot for it because there wasn't something that made it feel or look actually secured. But turns out, there's magnetic component so it gets sucked in rather than loosely placed. Battery power seems as advertised. I haven't charged mine in about a month and it's still going. Ergonomics is about what you'd expect based on the photos.

reviews.title: No more Batteries
reviews.text: Love my new mouse! Old one I would turn off and on all the time to save battery. This one I keep wanting to then remember it goes to sleep and no more batteries. First charge went fast, haven't had to charge it since. Love the self storing dongle. Should have purchased this long time ago.

title: Gaming Keyboard and Mouse Combo, MageGee GK770 RGB Backlit Wired Gaming Keyboard with Multimedia Keys, Ergonomic Wrist Rest Computer Keyboard, 3200 DPI Gaming Mouse for Windows PC Gamers
features: ✅GAMING KEYBOARD & MOUSE: A standard 104 keys layout plus 10 multimedia function keys (total 114 keys), gives faster response and better tactile feedback. Accurate, comfortable, soft touch with anti-ghosting functionality. RGB backlit effect provides a unique visual experience, taking you into a pretty cool gaming atmosphere. Ergonomic wrist rest offers enough support and protection to your hands, and reduce hand fatigue caused by long-term use.

✅10 MULTIMEDIA KEYS & 25 NON-CONFLICT KEYS: 10 independent multimedia keys at the top of the keyboard makes it quick access to music player, email, computer, calculator without interrupting your game. 25 anti-ghosting keys allow you to press or hold multiple keys simultaneously, helping you win in the fierce game without being bound by speed. Adjustable rear feet and non-slip pads provide comfortable typing experience.

✅RGB LED BACKLIGHT KEYBOARD: The keyboard has RGB light settings with multiple modes (dynamic backlit or solid static light) to choose from, making it shining and sparkling in the dark, easy to find the correct keys and reduce error rate. You can adjust backlight brightness and speed according to personal preference. The backlight also can be turned off / on by pressing Fn + Page Down.

✅ADJUSTABLE DPI GAMING MOUSE: 7 colors LED breathing backlit ( blue, yellow, green, white, purple, red, cyan), 4 adjustable DPI - 600/800/1200/1600/2400/3200 to match the mouse speed instantly for different game scenarios. Advanced gaming optical sensor ensures accurate positioning and stable transmission. Pressing the DPI button for 3 seconds can turn off the mouse backlight. Contoured shape fits your hands perfectly, comfortable to use.

✅WIDE COMPATIBILITY: The USB wired keyboard and mouse combo is simple to use, just plug and play, no need for additional driver or software. Works well with Win2000, Win XP, WinME, Vista, Win7, Win8, Android, linux, Mac and other operating systems. Suitable for gaming beginners or lovers.

Connection Strength
The higher the signal strength, the more reliable your connection will be. Especially important in busy wireless environments like airports.

Tracking Quality
Look for smooth, precise cursor control. The higher the quality, the easier it is to navigate documents and web pages. The best also work on more surfaces, including glass.
Advanced optical sensor Advanced optical sensor for multi-surface tracking Also works on glass  Laser Sensor Laser Sensor Also works on glass

Stay more productive and eliminate hassles with longer periods between battery changes or a rechargeable mouse. 1 AA battery(18 months max. battery life) 2 AA batteries(3 years max. battery life) 2 AA batteries(6 months max. battery life)   1 AA battery(12 months max. battery life) 2 AA batteries(2 years max. battery life) Rechargeable
Wireless Receiver

reviews.title: A very nice mouse.
reviews.text:
I tried to use both of the most recent Apple mouse products with my Macbook Pro and never could get the hang of either one of them. I tried configuring them in the applications folder but never could get it right plus neither one of them was comfortable. One had a ball and the other newer one did not. Usually I really like apple products but not this time. I am happy to report this Logitech worked right out of the box after I plugged in the USB thingy. i didn't even have to set it up. I do like the roller ball. I think this mouse can do more than I know about, but am just happy it isn't changing the page I am on constantly. I got the one that was painted blue and green because it was about 6.00 cheaper than the solid colored ones. I like the design now that I have it. Since my laptop only has two USB plug ins, I bought the Amazon USB hub with three additional spots. Am happy with that too.
UPDATE 11-08-14
All of a sudden I am getting these messages saying the battery is critically low. To start with I was changing the batteries every time but it was happening way too fast so I bought a battery checker. Turns out my batteries are fine. Testing 100 %. the mouse continue to operate even though I continue receiving low battery warnings. Don't know how this is going to play out but it is the first sign of trouble. Now I just take battery out. Test it and when it continues to say 100 % I put it back in and the message goes away for a couple of days. Aggravating. I am amending star count down to 4 stars. Can't change stars.

reviews.title: Works great - great little wireless mouse.

reviews.title: The middle click and scroll wheel work great! Microsoft 4000 is smoother and more comfortable though.
reviews.text:
I own this mouse as well as the Microsoft Wireless Mobile Mouse 4000 now. I find them to be head to head competitors, so here's a quick comparison.

Logitech:
-Somewhat of a loud click, doesn't bother me personally, but it is obviously louder
-The harder you flick the scroll wheel the more it'll spin. There is resistance though and I feel like it's easier to use than the Microsoft mouse.
-It looks cool and functionality is fine. The middle click is easy to use and the left/right of the wheel to move back or forward in a web browser works and isn't annoyingly used by accident.

Microsoft:
-Quiet click and smoother sliding on the desk
-The wheel stops once your finger leaves it. You can't just flick and go. Scrolling seems more precise with this one, but I actually prefer the Logitech as I feel like I have more functional control with it.
-There is a side button that moves you backward in a web browser, the wheel left and right tilting doesn't seem to do anything.
-More comfortable in my hand.

Bottom line: Microsoft Wireless Mobile Mouse 4000 is smoother and more comfortable, but Logitech is more functional, especially for the middle click and scroll wheel. I was very skeptical about the benefits of this "free-wheel" but I love it now. If you're not a big scroll wheel and middle click enthusiast go with the Microsoft, otherwise the Logitech is for you.

reviews.title: you get what you pay for
reviews.text: these work but feel like crap.  Left and right click are terrible.  Sometimes when I left click, as the piece of plastic is coming back up, it goes under the right side.  Its like someone took a solid sheet of plastic and cut a line down the middle to allow you to press down on the left or right side, its terrible.  Scroll wheel feels fine.  DPI button just cycles through, no way to go up or down, just cycles through 3 modes.  Very uncomfortable.  For the price, you get two and both are exactly like this so I doubt its defective.  I only got these to control my streaming PC so its not a HUGE deal, but if youre getting these for daily use - DONT DO IT.  I can hardly put up with these and I use them for maybe 10 mins a day.  Pay 15$ for one mouse.  I honestly feel like I could crush these with my hand - thats how crappy they feel.  They also go to sleep mode after like 5 mins so I have to constantly click it to wake it up, and it ends up opening apps.  Not worth the 15$

reviews.title: Amazing l! Always get what I order with fast shipping and selections to choose from!!
reviews.text: I’m always satisfied with anything I have ordered from Amazon and they nailed it with this order. Since I was drooping sizes I wasn’t sure!!  Super fast shipping!!! I had placed a big order, 3 days after placing order, I was opening my packages, and that’s counting the evening I placed my order!  I received  all my order at same time,I had to order several clothing items due to a major  weight loss because of illness!!!! Everything I have is too big for me now so I had nothing to wear and when I say nothing, I mean NOTHING!!! I had to order smaller sized clothes  so I’d have some clothes to wear!! I’m talking about losing 28lbs, which doctors say I’m  probably not gonna gain back, maybe  5-10lbs if I’m lucky!!!  All I been wearing is my pj’s and yes had to order some pj’s!!!!! I’m normally a small, sizes 5,6,7, weight 120-125, small frame,and am 5’3” tall. So I can’t afford to lose weight esp. 28lbs which was all lost over a 4 wk period of time, I have trouble keeping weight on me anyway!! And I can’t gorge myself with the foods that will make me gain weight cause I’m a diabetic!! So I’m in a no-win situation!!!! Thank you Amazon for giving me some cloths to wear. I ordered sizes 2-5 in slacks or jeans, small or 5-6 pj’s, small or med tops, small or 5-6 lounge clothing, so I’d say they are true to size at least for me they are. So hope that helps with ur sizing if u not sure!! Cause all the clothing was in that size range and I have 2  items that is to big out of all the clothing I ordered. Grouped all clothing in this review on size instead of  each individual piece of clothing!!! So go with ur size u are changing to and Amazon measurements to make sure and by looking at my before and after size, weight that should get u right on size u need to order.

reviews.title: Great battery life
reviews.text: I'm still not fully decided about how I feel about this mouse. But, I can talk about what I know so far. The packaging I got the mouse and was really nice, really simple, but easy to open. The mouse was easy to set up, and the RGB looks pretty cool. There is a really cool DPI changer function that makes gaming much easier, however, I can't recommend this mouse for gaming because the ergonomics are pretty trash. I have to cramp my hand like a claw over the top of the mouse and after long periods of use it does start hurting. The surface is also pretty slippery, so I found that my hand slips on the mouse all the time. The tracking however, is great! And I would have to say that biggest plus is the battery life. I got this about 2 weeks ago, charged it once, and it is yet to die! I think the features of this mouse are great, but I would not recommend it. Purely because of the ergonomics, if you are going to use this mouse often, then you probably should go if something more ergonomic.

reviews.title: Poor performance | no charge indicator
reviews.text: Highly susceptible to interference. Drags and lags.

reviews.title: Meh
reviews.text: I like the size and the LED colors.  The battery life is a little lackluster and it actually starts acting up when it's "tired".  I got it for my iPad but haven't used it a month or so b/c I got tired of her attitude.

reviews.title: Had 2 of these and they both died
reviews.text: Will never buy from this company again... the second one we bought froze and would not work again.. same as the first one.

reviews.title: Basic but functions well
reviews.text: I ordered a ‘LED Wireless Mouse, Uiosmuph G12 Slim Rechargeable Wireless Silent Mouse, 2.4G Portable USB Optical Wireless Computer Mice with USB Receiver and Type C Adapter (Silver)’ for review.  For the price point, this is a basic mouse.  The rotating light strip is a cool looking feature.  It is sleek in design.  It connected well with the dongle to my Surface Pro.  It glides well over a mouse pad.  It is rechargeable, which I prefer to battery operated.  The click of this mouse is quiet. The dongle slides into the bottom and of course it has already been lost.  I prefer the dongle to be stored in a closed compartment on a mouse.  It does not require recharging for several days of moderate use and seems to charge quickly.  Overall, for basic use, this mouse works well.

reviews.title: Nice design
reviews.text: I use this with my netbook to control it across the room. It is smaller than most other mouse. It goes easily in my travel bag. Nice design. I got tired of plain black.

reviews.title: One of the best everyday mice I've used
reviews.text:
I have input devices for drawing on my tablet, and I have a gaming mouse, but the Logitech M305 is an excellent mouse for every day use, so it's the one I use the most.

The mouse itself has very basic features,
* scroll wheel (mild clicking feedback)with side-click options
* battery status light (green when fully charged, red when almost out)
* two buttons
* an off switch
* a nano USB transmitter than stores inside the mouse
* uses a single AA battery

It does come in jazzy designs, and I liked the yellow/gold one the best. The one thing I might have wanted to change on this mouse is the on/off switch. The best nano-USB mouse I've ever had would automatically turn off when you stored the transmitter inside. With this one, be sure to flip the switch to off as well before you put it in your bag, or it will be down there draining the battery as it moves around.
